items.name: Lesser Key of Solomon
items.description:
JOIN THE GROUP!!!

Unlock the secrets of arcane knowledge with the Lesser Key of Solomon, bound in worn leather and resting at your hip, radiating an eerie mystique. Do you dare to wield the wisdom of the ancients, or will the pages turn on their own?

items.name: Battlemage Waist Sash (White)
items.description:
It's been said that a wizard audacious enough to wear white is either a magician most powerful, or is masquerading as such. To wear white is to tell your opponents that you're confident no weapon or spell could ever dirty your clothing. This has led to many misunderstandings and public incidents in the southern spires, where white becomes a choice color to beat the heat of the summer season.
